domain: Pillar coral synchronous broadcast spawning — entire reef releases gametes simultaneously on lunar-darkness trigger; mass-synchronized event.
specific_mechanism: External shared environmental signal (post-full-moon darkness window) triggers simultaneous release across all individuals.
llm_application: REEF-SPAWN: barrier-synchronized multi-agent broadcast. N agents work independently until external clock fires; then all simultaneously broadcast current candidate to aggregation barrier; aggregator votes/merges; no chained debate rounds.
novelty_claim: S2-MAD has independent first-round + group consensus. Adaptive Stability MAD does barrier stopping. CortexDebate is sparse graph. REEF-SPAWN simplifies to external-clock single-barrier; mainstream barrier-pattern.
